name: Selkirk Team Backpack
description: The Selkirk Team Backpack holds up to 4 paddles and all your gear in a ventilated, weather-resistant design. Features a dedicated paddle compartment with fleece lining, separate shoe pocket, insulated cooler pocket, and padded laptop sleeve for players heading straight from work to the court.
care_instructions: Spot clean with mild soap and water. Air dry completely before storing to prevent mildew. Machine washing is not recommended as it can damage the PVC backing and structure.
